message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "SERVER NODE 1" as S1
participant "SERVER NODE 2" as S2
participant "STATE CACHE" as SC
participant "BROKER" as B
participant "TBM/HU" as TBM
participant "APP" as APP

S1..>S1 : new request/response interaction
S1..>S1 : create interaction context
S1..>S1 : newMessageID = nextMessageID()
S1..>SC : put(newMessageID, interaction context)
S1..>S1 : create message
S1..>S1 : message.messageID = newMessageID
S1..>B : publish message

B..>TBM : read message
TBM..>TBM : create response
TBM..>TBM : response.correlationID = message.messageID
TBM..>B : publish response

B..>S2 : read response
S2..>SC : interaction context = get(response.correlationID)
S2..>SC : process response
S2..>SC : delete(response.correlationID)

@enduml
